questionHtml: Global warming increases the temperature of the Mediterranean Sea. Alessia claims that this promotes the mackerel population growth rate and hence the value of α is doubled. No other parameter changes.
markschemeHtml:
Meq=δγ is not dependent on α                      R1


Note: Award R0 for any contextual argument.


no change         A1


Note: Do not award R0A1.


[2 marks]
